set_network_mode_5g_lte: Set Network Mode to 5G NR/4G LTE Only
set_network_mode_5g_only: Set Network Mode to 5G NR Only
set_network_mode_lte_only: Set Network Mode to 4G LTE Only

blocked.qscanfreq: Use the Cell Scanner page for frequency scanning.
blocked.qscan: Use the Cell Scanner page for network scanning.
blocked.factory_reset: Factory reset is not allowed from the terminal.

warnings.disable_radio: This will disable the modem radio. If connected via Tailscale, you may lose access to this UI.
